notes: Copy to pathophys-pharm-seo-batch.json (gitignored locally if preferred). Generate with: cd nursenest-core && npx tsx scripts/generate-blog-posts.ts --topics-file=./scripts/blog/your-topics.txt --pathway=<id> --min-words=1800 --publish (after review). Canonical storage: Postgres BlogPost via existing pipeline — not files under reports/.

items.topic: Why does hyperkalemia widen the QRS on the monitor — mechanism and first nursing actions (NCLEX-style)

When should you hold metformin before contrast — contraindications and lactic acidosis risk (new grad)
Paramedic exam question: ketamine vs etomidate for RSI — hemodynamic trade-offs in shock
MLT exam question: why does hemolysis falsely lower or skew potassium on a chemistry panel
OT board-style question: anticholinergic burden and functional cognition in older adults
PT exam prep: loading dose vs maintenance for antiseizure medications after traumatic injury — what changes on exams
Social work licensing: psychopharm basics — SSRIs, serotonin syndrome cues, and escalation thresholds
PSW exam question: insulin timing with meals — hypoglycemia prevention and observation priorities
Respiratory therapy exam: why salbutamol can drop potassium — mechanism and monitoring
